name: Jorge Calandrelli
abstract: Jorge Calandrelli (December 31, 1939 – May 4, 2026) was an Argentine composer, arranger, and conductor known for his work with Barbra Streisand, Celine Dion, Arturo Sandoval, Yo-Yo Ma, Tony Bennett, Elton John, Lady Gaga, and John Legend. He won 6 Grammy Awards and received 28 nominations.

about_quotes.speaker: Jane Monheit
about_quotes.evidence: making “Surrender” with Jorge Calandrelli we did sort of Brazilian stuff
about_quotes.doc_title: Jane Monheit interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, August 20, 2010
